title: Password Strength Checker
description: Verify if a password meets length requirements using If/Else.
problemStatement:
Security is important! Your script should ask the user to enter a new password and check its 'strength' based on length.

- If the password is less than 8 characters, print `"Weak Password: Too short!"`.
- Otherwise, print `"Strong Password: Looks good!"`.

**Hint:** Use the `len()` function to check the length of a string.
hints: Don't forget the colon (`:`) after your `if` and `else` statements.
